text.title: AC-to-Assertion Mapping Examples
text.summary: Worked examples — one happy-path mapping and one antipattern caught at review.

example.title: Signup-form story mapped end-to-end
example.note: Story STORY-42 has three ACs: (AC-1) submit valid form persists user; (AC-2) invalid email rejected with INVALID_EMAIL code; (AC-3) rate-limit at 5/min returns 429 with retry-after. ac-mapping.yaml lists each AC with one or two tests; asserted_behavior reads "response 201 AND db.users row created" (state), "response 400 AND error.code = INVALID_EMAIL" (negative), "6th call returns 429 AND retry-after header set" (output). Reviewer walks the three rows in five minutes; all behaviour assertions land. orphan_acs is empty; merge gate passes.

example.title: Structural-only mapping rejected
example.note: Same story; engineer pastes the table but `asserted_behavior` rows read "createUser was called", "validate was called with bad email", "rateLimiter was called". assertion_class set to "called". Validator rejects on f2 (structural tokens) and f3 (assertion_class not in enum). Reviewer rejects with the specific request: rewrite as state / output / side-effect / negative. Engineer rewrites the tests to check db rows and error codes; the second pass passes.
